**Skill Name:**

**What does it do?** (one sentence)

**Which platform/tool does it work with?**
e.g., AliExpress + Dianxiaomi ERP

**What problem does it solve?**

**Has it been tested?**
- [ ] Tested on Hermes Agent
- [ ] Works end-to-end
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials

**Files included:**
- [ ] SKILL.md
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Scripts (if any)
